title: Introduction to contractions
description: Apostrophes help shorten words by creating contractions. Learn how to spot them!
topic_path: Punctuation: end-of-sentence punctuation, the comma, and the apostrophe

assessment_items.question_content:
**Pick the answer that correctly uses a contraction in this sentence.** 

>People always say you \_\_\_\_\_\_ swim immediately after you eat.


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Contractions are used to shorten expressions by standing in for missing letters.

For example:

* I will → I'll
* Do not → don't
The appropriate contraction for "can not" is **can't**.
